allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Write-Output '\\''=== WMI Monitor Names ==='\\''; Get-CimInstance -Namespace root/wmi -ClassName WmiMonitorID | Sort-Object InstanceName | ForEach-Object { $f = if \($_.UserFriendlyName\) { -join \($_.UserFriendlyName | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 } | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }\) } else { '\\'''\\'' }; $m = if \($_.ManufacturerName\) { -join \($_.ManufacturerName | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 } | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }\) } else { '\\'''\\'' }; Write-Output \('\\''  Instance: '\\'' + $_.InstanceName + '\\'' | Name: '\\'' + $f + '\\'' | Mfr: '\\'' + $m\) }; Write-Output '\\'''\\''; Write-Output '\\''=== DDC/CI capable \(PnP\) ==='\\''; Get-PnpDevice -Class Monitor -Status OK | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('\\''  '\\'' + $_.InstanceId + '\\'' | '\\'' + $_.FriendlyName\) }')
